features: FRESHNESS THAT LASTS: Femfresh Active Intimate Wash helps you feel fresh and confident all day, even after exercise or busy routines
PH BALANCED & SOAP FREE: This gentle feminine wash supports your skin‚Äôs natural balance and prevents dryness or irritation.
WITH GINSENG & ANTIOXIDANTS: The refreshing Femfresh wash formula includes ginseng extract and antioxidants to help energise and care for intimate skin.
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Gynaecologist-approved, hypoallergenic intimate wash ‚Äì suitable for sensitive skin and daily use.

description: Product Description Stay confidently fresh with Femfresh Active Intimate Wash, a revitalising feminine hygiene wash designed for daily freshness. Enriched with ginseng extract and antioxidants, this gentle formula helps refresh and energise intimate skin, keeping you feeling comfortable after workouts or throughout the day. The pH-balanced, soap-free formula is dermatologically and gynaecologically tested to care for your delicate vaginal and vulval area without causing dryness or irritation. It‚Äôs hypoallergenic and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Use this Femfresh intimate wash as part of your daily shower routine for long-lasting freshness and care. The light, clean scent leaves you feeling confident and ready for whatever the day brings. Complete your routine with the full Fem fresh range, including feminine wipes and intimate washing gels, specially created to maintain your natural balance and keep you feeling fresh, clean and cared for. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Triethyl Citrate, Parfum, Laureth-4, Polyquaternium-39, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Lilium Candidum Flower Extract, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Sodium Hydroxide, Glycerin, Lactic Acid, Butylene Glycol, Sodium Carbonate, Propylene Glycol, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol, Sodium Lactate, Calendula Officinalis Extract, Plumeria Alba Extracts. Directions For external use only. Pour a small amount of Femfresh Active Intimate Wash into your hand or onto a washcloth. Gently cleanse the external vaginal and vulval area, lather, and rinse thoroughly with warm water. Use daily or after exercise for lasting freshness. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation develops. Keep out of reach of children.
